title: Artificial Minerals
description: Adds 8 new machines, 17 new blocks, and 22 new items all with the goal of turning cobblestone into any ore of choice!
body:
# Overview
This mod adds 8 new machines, 17 new blocks, and 22 new items all with the goal of turning cobblestone into any ore of choice! If you encounter any bugs, please comment them and I will (hopefully) fix them. Each machine will require a tutorial since they can be rather hard to grasp with no background knowlage.

## Sifter
![Sifter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1b899f3495df76fad576102e8838ee2e960bb58.png) 

The Sifter's top slot takes **_cobblestone_**. Pressing the sift button will have the chance to turn the cobblestone into other nuggets and maybe even ingots.

![Sifter Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/825987c4db82a091327a50a12bada3a413e7d3cd.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 5 Iron Nuggets
- 3 Gold Nuggets
- 1 Iron Ingot
- (really rare) 1 Diamond

</details>

## Grinder
![Grinder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4ec2e3abc89e876cb49d53c26862414b9e459f.png)

The Grinder's top slot takes **_Coal, Copper, Iron, and Gold_**. Pressing the grind button will convert the ore into 9 of the ore's nugget form.

![Grinder Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c4dd1baefaf185b38ae50b4a2249c10c979fa11.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 9 Coal Nuggets
- 9 Copper Nuggets
- 9 Iron Nuggets
- 9 Gold Nuggets

</details>

## Fine Grinder
![Fine Grinder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e23ea9eaaa630e2f2db679862fd17e6dbc8384.png)

The Fine Grinder's top slot takes **_Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, and Netherite_**. Pressing the grind button will convert the ore into 9 of the ore's nugget form.

![Fine Grinder Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bcb759cbdb7c6a353a7e4442779f81dd5228721.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 9 Coal Nuggets
- 9 Copper Nuggets
- 9 Iron Nuggets
- 9 Gold Nuggets
- 9 Diamond Nuggets
- 9 Emerald Nuggets
- 9 Netherite Nuggets

</details>

## Melter
![Melter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64920c74fc9a9c357852445152c4f2f87053ea47.png)

The Melter must have a fire underneath it to work. The Melter's top slot takes **_Lapis_**. Lapis cannot be grinded due to it having a complex magical ability that would be destroyed if grinded. Melting will result in getting 9 Lapis nuggets.

![Melter Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2082eb234820966f3332dc97214d42f9ecd593.png)

## Separator
![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bda3f7aca2ca5e5d353d375d4dc0699ed629a512.png)

The Seperator, as well as the Fabricator, take up a 2x1x2 space. Be mindful of this while placing. The Separator must have fire underneath it's boiler to work. The Separator's topmost slot can hold **_cobblestone_**, the leftmost slot can hold a **_water bucket_**, and the rightmost slot can hold an empty **_bucket_**. When the separate button is pressed, water from the water bucket boils the cobblestone and separates the minerals contained in the cobblestone into a molten state, giving you a bucket of molten minerals. The cobblestone can be replaced with **_netherack_** to create molten netherack.

![Separator Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653b1a49dce438ddaac42a17057bb9ba4d81b73c.png)

## Centrifuge
![Centrifuge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d5bda57d029d1c942e332530095c3035e6f1157.png)

The Centrifuge's top slot takes a **_moleon mineral bucket_** or **_molten netherite bucket_**, aswell as a sample in the sample slot. If a molten mineral bucket is inserted, the sample can be any **_nugget_** exept a **_netherite nugget_**. If a molten netherite bucket is inserted, the sample can be a **_netherite nugget_** aswell as a **_gold nugget_**. Pressing the centrifuge button will convert the bucket into a **_mineral-like metal block_**.

![Centrifuge Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93de7bc02b647e736bce78a1a7ba0c560c8d987c.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 1 Coal-Like Metal Block
- 1 Copper-Like Metal Block
- 1 Iron-Like Metal Block
- 1 Gold-Like Metal Block
- 1 Lapis-Like Metal Block
- 1 Diamond-Like Metal Block
- 1 Emerald-Like Metal Block
- 1 Netherite-Like Metal Block

</details>


## Enhancer
![Enhancer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3883d5632c42384925e5ba8f1161da89e36094d4.png)

The Enhancer is an **_optional_** step in the conversion process, but will yeild better results if done. The rightmost slot can have any **_mineral-like block_** in it, and the leftmost slot can contain the **_liquid_** used to make it in the centrifuge, such as a **_molten mineral bucket_**. When the enrich button is pressed, the regular mineral-like block into an **_enriched mineral-like block_**.

![Enhancer Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec177c89894799f9b19fa13d0162e68a594bd6dd.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 1 Enriched Coal-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Copper-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Iron-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Gold-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Lapis-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Diamond-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Emerald-Like Metal Block
- 1 Enriched Netherite-Like Metal Block

</details>

## Fabricator
![Fabricator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/509378765a438f2cc080619c924e7774423273c5.png)

The Fabricator, as well as the Separator, take up a 2x1x2 space. Be mindful of this while placing. The fabricator's top slot takes any **_regular and enriched mineral-like block_**. When the fabricate button is pressed, the block will be converted into its ore counterpart. Regular mineral-like blocks will give 1 of the respected ore, and enriched mineral-like blocks will give 3 of the respected ore.

![Fabricator Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57028fecd840bf50add89ebd966687de3736b5bd.png)

### Recivable Item List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 1 Coal
- 3 Coal
- 1 Copper Ingot
- 3 Copper Ingot
- 1 Iron Ingot
- 3 Iron Ingot
- 1 Gold Ingot
- 3 Gold Ingot
- 1 Lapis
- 3 Lapis
- 1 Diamond
- 3 Diamond
- 1 Emerald
- 3 Emerald
- 1 Netherite Ingot
- 3 Netherite Ingot

</details>

### There are custom advancements!

## Item list for nerds:
- Sifter
- Grinder
- Fine Grinder
- Melter
- Separator
- Centrifuge
- Enhancer
- Fabricator
- Support Block
- Sift

- Boiler
- Molten Mineral Bucket
- Molten Netherite Bucket
- Coal-Like Metal Block
- Copper-Like Metal Block
- Iron-Like Metal Block
- Gold-Like Metal Block
- Lapis-Like Metal Block
- Diamond-Like Metal Block
- Emerald-Like Metal Block
- Netherite-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Coal-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Copper-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Iron-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Gold-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Lapis-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Diamond-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Emerald-Like Metal Block
- Enriched Netherite-Like Metal Block
- Coal Nugget
- Copper Nugget
- Iron Nugget
- Gold Nugget
- Diamond Nugget
- Emerald Nugget
- Netherite Nugget
